prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: At the very bottom of the Sparkling Blue Sea, where the coral castles grow tall and the seaweed forests sway, there lived an octopus named Ollie. Ollie had eight splendid, swirly arms, could change his color to match anything at all, and was very, very good at hiding. In fact, Ollie was the best hider in the entire bay, because Ollie was shy. He watched the gliding stingrays and the giggling pufferfish playing tag in the current, wishing more than anything to join them, but his shyness held him tight, like a secret tucked away in a shell.
